meta.done_rule: zero open blockers AND zero open majors (spec §5 loop-until-done, §7 sign-off)
meta.target_repo_note: command/gap-scan checks run inside $TARGET_REPO (the RestoreAssist codebase, CleanExpo/Unite-Hub). With no TARGET_REPO set, command checks report 'open' (unevaluated) — which is the correct starting state.

check_kinds.command: runs a shell command in TARGET_REPO; exit 0 = pass
check_kinds.attestation: a named human/reviewer sign-off recorded in readiness-state.json
check_kinds.gap-scan: runs the §3 enumeration command in TARGET_REPO; exit 0 = no gaps

gates.title: Dispatch cannot fire on an unverified match
gates.done_definition: No code path dispatches a contractor to a property until the match is verified against vetting + coverage rules.

check.todo: confirm the dispatch-gate test name in RestoreAssist

gates.title: Payment cannot exceed threshold without human approval
gates.done_definition: Amount + payee validated; any payment above the configured threshold pauses for a human approve before money moves.

check.todo: confirm test name + that PAYMENT_AUTO_APPROVE_MAX is enforced server-side

gates.title: Insurance claim submit/alter requires Lens check + human confirm
gates.done_definition: No claim is submitted or altered without a legal/ethics (Lens) check AND an explicit human confirmation.

gates.title: Crisis customer comms are template-bound with a human escalation path
gates.done_definition: Customer-facing comms in a crisis are template-bound (no free-form agent text to distressed people) with a working escalation path to a human.

gates.title: Contractor onboarding verifies credentials + insurance (not self-attestation)
gates.done_definition: Contractor approval requires verified credential + current insurance evidence; self-attestation alone cannot approve.

gates.title: Surge fallback + 24/7 escalation SLA defined (no-human-available rule)
gates.done_definition: Documented + tested rule for when no human is available during a surge: either auto-approve within tight bounds OR queue-and-degrade — never silent auto-fire. Pager/on-call owner + escalation SLA named (resolves the 3am-during-a-disaster gap).

gates.title: Requirements written, assumptions explicit, no placeholders/contradictions
gates.done_definition: Features, users (distressed customers, contractors, insurers) and constraints written down; assumptions explicit; brainstorming self-review finds no placeholders/contradictions.

check.todo: point at the RestoreAssist requirements docs path

gates.title: Nova confirms scope realistic
gates.done_definition: Senior PM (Nova) sign-off that the scope is realistic.

gates.title: Every requirement maps to a screen/flow
gates.done_definition: Each requirement traces to a designed screen/flow incl. the stressed-customer path; empty/loading/error/failure states covered.

check.todo: add a requirement→flow traceability check in RestoreAssist, or convert to attestation

gates.title: Pixel + Nova confirm crisis flow is usable under stress
gates.done_definition: Design review confirms the stressed-customer path is genuinely usable under stress.

gates.title: Schema validates
gates.done_definition: Data model defined; schema validates clean.

gates.title: API spec is machine-readable
gates.done_definition: Every API endpoint specified in a machine-readable contract (e.g. OpenAPI) that lints clean.

gates.title: Matching logic deterministic, logged + explainable
gates.done_definition: Matching algorithm inputs/outputs specified; deterministic; every decision logged with an explanation; fairness + vetting-freshness asserted.

check.todo: confirm matching test name; ensure fairness + vetting-not-lapsed assertions exist

gates.title: Forge + Vex confirm scale + explainable matching
gates.done_definition: Architecture review confirms it supports scale and the matching is explainable.

gates.title: Core flow runs end-to-end with every §4 gate enforced
gates.done_definition: Disaster→search→assess&match→accept&contact→complete→pay→claim runs end-to-end; dispatch/payment/insurance gates all enforced inline.

gates.title: Tool-failure retry→route→bail + budget/timeout caps exist
gates.done_definition: A tool failure retries, then routes, then bails; budget + timeout caps exist and are enforced.

gates.title: Nova + Lens confirm no agent commits a §4 action alone
gates.done_definition: Review confirms no agent can commit any §4 consequential action without the gate clearing.

gates.title: Payment/insurance/contractor integrations pass + fail gracefully
gates.done_definition: Integration tests pass on realistic data; failure modes are handled, not crashed.

gates.title: AI outputs validated before use
gates.done_definition: Every AI output is schema/range-validated before any downstream use.

gates.title: Vex confirms AI outputs validated
gates.done_definition: Data/algorithm review confirms AI output validation is sufficient.

gates.title: Clean repeatable deploy end-to-end
gates.done_definition: A documented deploy to the target environment runs clean end-to-end.

check.todo: confirm deploy dry-run / CI deploy job

gates.title: Rollback tested
gates.done_definition: Rollback to the previous good state is tested and works.

gates.title: Grid confirms no undocumented manual steps
gates.done_definition: DevOps review confirms the deploy has no undocumented manual steps.

gates.title: Full suite green on a clean checkout
gates.done_definition: Unit + integration + regression suite passes on a fresh clone.

gates.title: Surge/load test passes at the named target
gates.done_definition: Load test passes at the documented surge target (e.g. 50× baseline concurrent intakes in a regional event) with a defined degradation policy. The target number MUST be set (see attestation p57_load_target).

check.todo: confirm load harness; encode the surge multiple

gates.title: Surge target number is defined
gates.done_definition: The peak concurrent-intake target + surge multiple + degradation policy are written down (otherwise the load gate is not falsifiable).

gates.title: Nova confirms tests cover behaviour that matters
gates.done_definition: PM review confirms tests cover the behaviour that matters, not just coverage %.

gates.title: Security review passes
gates.done_definition: Security review passes (deps audited, advisors clean); access controls tested.

check.todo: swap for the real security gate (deepsec/snyk)

gates.title: No secrets in code or logs
gates.done_definition: Secret scan finds nothing in code or logs.

gates.title: Access controls tested
gates.done_definition: AuthN/AuthZ and access controls have passing tests.

gates.title: Named compliance regime documented + Lens sign-off (PHASE-0 BLOCKER)
gates.done_definition: The applicable regimes are named, scoped, and signed by Lens: PCI-DSS (payments), Privacy Act 1988 + APPs (vulnerable-person data), insurance claims-handling (ASIC/AFCA considerations), and state contractor licensing (e.g. QBCC). Elevated from 'open item' to a blocking gate.

gates.title: Lens confirms posture fits disaster-recovery + insurance + payments
gates.done_definition: Legal/ethics review confirms the compliance posture fits the domain.

gates.title: Restore-from-backup tested
gates.done_definition: A backup restore is tested and succeeds.

gates.title: Integrity checks pass
gates.done_definition: Data integrity checks pass; real data loads.

gates.title: Migrations validated
gates.done_definition: Migrations validated (forward + reversible).

gates.title: Lens + Grid confirm data handling matches promises and law
gates.done_definition: Review confirms data handling matches stated promises and applicable law.

gates.title: Cutover runbook dry-run
gates.done_definition: A cutover runbook exists and a dry-run completes.

gates.title: Rollback triggers + go/no-go criteria exist
gates.done_definition: Documented rollback triggers and go/no-go criteria exist.

gates.title: Nova + Atlas sign go/no-go
gates.done_definition: Senior PM + Orchestrator sign the go/no-go decision.

gates.title: A non-builder ran the platform from docs alone (without the agent stack)
gates.done_definition: A person who did not build it ran the platform from documentation alone — and crucially, WITHOUT the OpenClaw agent stack — proving owned, transferable knowledge.

gates.title: All code/config/docs under United Software accounts
gates.done_definition: All code, infra config and docs live under United Software's repos/accounts — no third party required to deploy, change, or understand it.

gates.title: Atlas confirms no single point of human dependency
gates.done_definition: Review confirms no builder-only knowledge / single point of human dependency.

gates.title: Gap-discovery pass returns zero open blockers/majors
gates.done_definition: The §3 enumeration (expected components per phase vs what exists in repo/deploy/docs) returns zero open blockers or majors. This gate is satisfied automatically when every other gate passes; it exists so the loop reports the §7 verdict explicitly.
